settings.title: Choose your plan
settings.text: Select the subscription rhythm that fits your household and let ROAMSOME handle the weekly surprise-country reveal.

settings.title: Receive fresh ingredients
settings.text: Get pre-portioned ingredients, chef tips and recipe cards delivered chilled anywhere across mainland UK.

settings.title: Cook and discover the destination
settings.text: Create premium dishes inspired by a surprise country experience revealed only when your curated box arrives.

settings.title: A surprise country experience
settings.text: Every delivery is built around one destination, with premium ingredients, a recipe journey and cultural cues that make the evening feel transportive from the first step to the final plate.

settings.title: Premium ingredients
settings.text: Fresh produce, premium proteins and thoughtful pantry elements selected for flavour and quality.

settings.title: Globally inspired recipes
settings.text: Every box is shaped by destination-led cooking so your week feels varied, exciting and memorable without needing to choose from a menu.

settings.title: Easy to cook, flexible to manage
settings.text: Short prep times, clear instructions and a subscription you can pause, skip or cancel anytime.

settings.title: Sicily Summer Table
settings.text: Bright citrus, basil, roasted vegetables and silky pasta inspired by long warm evenings on the coast.

settings.title: Kyoto Comfort Club
settings.text: A calm, umami-rich route featuring noodles, miso depth and balanced textures for relaxed evening cooking.

settings.title: Mexico City Night Market
settings.text: Layered spice, charred peppers and vibrant toppings designed to bring street-market energy to your kitchen.

settings.quote: Roamsome makes our weeknights feel like a mini city break. The ingredients arrive beautifully packed and every box feels genuinely special.
settings.name: Amelia H.

settings.quote: We tried it for convenience and stayed for the quality. The recipes are easy to follow but the final dishes feel restaurant level.
settings.name: Oliver P.

settings.quote: The travel angle is brilliant. We love discovering a new country every week without sacrificing freshness or simplicity.
settings.name: Sana R.

settings.title: Bringing Travel Home Through Dinner
settings.text: How a premium weeknight meal can recreate the feeling of arrival, discovery and place without leaving your kitchen.

settings.title: What Makes Global Cuisine Feel Authentic at Home
settings.text: A closer look at ingredients, technique and storytelling when building premium boxes inspired by world cuisines.

settings.title: The Art of Slower Weeknight Cooking
settings.text: Why premium home cooking is less about speed for its own sake and more about creating a calm, memorable rhythm at the end of the day.
